id.description: Unique identifier for this eval case.

domain.description: The domain this eval tests, e.g., @aikdna/writing.

input.description: The user input text to be evaluated.

expected_classification.description: The scenario or state the input should be classified into.

expected_axioms.description: Axiom IDs that should be triggered by this input.

expected_misunderstandings_avoided.description: Misunderstanding IDs the agent should avoid falling into.

expected_banned_terms_avoided.description: Banned terms the agent should avoid using.

output_rubric.description: What the judgment output should contain to pass.

pass.description: Whether this eval passed (set during verification).

evidence.description: Explanation of why the eval passed or failed.
